summary: Privacy policy page successfully implements the diner aesthetic with proper cream article card, teal background, correct typography hierarchy, and all required legal content sections. The effective date, section headings, and support contact are properly displayed with good mobile narrow readability.

violations.description: The support email link appears to use a different shade of rose than the specified #b83f5f for action links at rest

actions: Verify the support email link color matches the exact rose specification #b83f5f for action links
